title: brachyglottis saxifragoides
intro: Brachyglottis saxifragoides, also known as the New Zealand broom or white broom, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It belongs to the daisy family and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from pain. Brachyglottis saxifragoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which is often used in modern herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
